narrative_beat: Missil balistico com runas em ouro

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an extreme close-up of a ballistic missile styled as a giant sword-blade, steel body with crimson nose cone, Hebrew and Cyrillic engravings in gold along the flank
subject.focal_point: the gold-engraved Hebrew and Cyrillic characters along the missile side
subject.secondary: The missile appears dormant in silo, subtle steam rising, no human presence

composition.foreground: missile and engravings in rich steel-crimson-gold

mood.emotion: dread of annihilation at human disposal

symbolism.primary: the machaira megale renamed as nuclear warhead
symbolism.secondary: engravings as ancient language on modern weapon

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
